entry.title: Ubuntu Server on the NVIDIA DGX Spark (Without the Desktop)

link.title: Ubuntu Server on the NVIDIA DGX Spark (Without the Desktop)

entry.summary: When you buy an NVIDIA DGX Spark or an ASUS Ascent GX10, it ships with DGX OS. DGX OS is NVIDIA’s managed Ubuntu image, and it is fine - if you want a full GNOME desktop on an AI box. I did not want that. The GB10 has 128 GB of unified memory shared between the CPU and GPU over NVLink-C2C. Every gigabyte the OS and desktop environment consume is a gigabyte not available to your model. On the ...
